_note: SMALL hand-crafted sample mirroring ESPN's site-API commentary shape (sports.core.api / site.api.espn.com summary?event=...). ESPN nests timestamped lines under commentary[], each with a `time.displayValue` ('22\'') and a `text` body. Some lines also carry a `play` object; we ignore everything except time + text.

commentary.text: Goal! Brazil 1, Croatia 0. Vinicius Junior finishes low into the corner.
Cooling break. The officials pause play for a drinks break with the heat index soaring.
On-field review under way as the referee is sent to the monitor for a possible penalty.
Petkovic stays down after a heavy challenge and the physio is on to treat the knock.
We have a hydration break in the second half, the players taking on fluids.
Croatia work it out from the back but the final ball is overhit.
